steps.title: Identify the key tension mosses face
steps.content: Mosses need light but excessive sunlight causes drying—a tension that semitransparent quartz must resolve, given the 62% longer growth observed.

steps.title: Determine how quartz resolves the tension
steps.content:
The semitransparent quartz reduces light intensity, allowing the moss to retain more moisture while still receiving enough light for photosynthesis.

The other choices either describe a mere survival capability (A), contradict the positive finding of better growth (B), or introduce an unsupported condition about thickness (D).

That matches choice C — C is correct.
